phases.name: SOP executor cost gates + tier routing

tasks.name: Add cost gate pre-flight check to sop_executor.rs reason_with_tools() — estimate max_cost, block if > HEX_SOP_COST_GATE_USD, emit escalate_to_operator

Move operator memory load outside action loop in twin_reviewer.rs run_one() — cache memory snapshot per tick, reuse for all actions in batch
Reduce DRAFT_MAX_TOKENS from 4096 to 2048 in drafter.rs for one-pagers, add HEX_DRAFT_MAX_TOKENS env override
Create hex-nexus/src/cache/file_content.rs — LRU cache for repo_read tool with (path, mtime) key, 5min TTL, wire into repo_read tool
Enable Anthropic prompt caching in sop_executor.rs reason_via_anthropic() — set cache_control ephemeral on system prompt + ground pack
Create hex-nexus/src/routes/cost_metrics.rs — GET /api/cost-metrics aggregates inference_log by persona/tool/date, returns daily/MTD spend, 7-day sparkline data

Create hex-nexus/assets/src/components/views/CostMetrics.tsx — SolidJS view at #/cost-metrics, table [Persona | Today $ | MTD $ | Avg $/run], 7-day sparkline, alert banner when > HEX_DAILY_COST_LIMIT_USD
Add per-action cost preview to proposed_action detail view — estimate input/output tokens, show estimated_cost_usd + model_used before operator approval

phases.name: Verify cost gates + routing + dashboard integration
